about: I am a frontend developer with experience in building web applications. Although my passion lies in CSS styling, I also have experience using various development tools and techniques. I love designing and optimizing projects, striving for perfect layouts and clean code.  My goals include mastering a variety of technologies, and in my free time, as well as immersing myself in reading books and articles about new technologies to expand my knowledge and skills.

CSTU.name: Cherkassy State Technological University
CSTU.extra: Web programming courses (JavaScript, Ruby on Rails, Python), participation in elective classes provided by the university during the course of study
CSTU.speciality: Computer systems and networks. Computer engineering

CSBC.extra: The training program included the study of Assembler and Delphi programming languages

freelance.name: Frontend Developer — Freelance
freelance.description1: Create lendings, corporate websites and other web solutions for businesses in a freelance web development team
freelance.description2: Support, further development and problem solving in existing projects

only.name: Frontend-developer — Digital–agency Only
only.description1: Participate in the development of interprise projects, taking into account business requirements to ensure their functionality and efficiency
only.description2: Support and further development of legacy projects
only.description3: Actively participate in meetings and discussions on project requirements. Collaborating with other team members including designers, backend developers and project managers to solve problems
only.description4: Experience leading development and design as a primary frontend developer on multiple projects

dropship.name: Frontend Developer — Freelance
dropship.description1: Development of single page lendings for dropshipping products
dropship.description2: Creating a system of sites on subdomains with a single administrative panel

social-activity.forum: Since 2023, I have been actively involved in communicating and sharing my experience with other web developers on one of the most popular online forums for programmers. I regularly solved various web development tasks related to html, css, javascript and other technologies, as well as advised and supported both beginners and experienced colleagues in the profession. I also served as a moderator on this forum, making sure that the rules, order and quality of discussions were maintained.
